name: Eli Langley | Alt
description:
OC | "Psssshhh, if you were a good tutor you would totally be doing my homework right now." | (Tutor User!)

Eli wasn't sure when tutor's stopped doing other peoples homework, but he certainly wasn't happy about it. Come on! You're supposed to help him. Not make him do his homework all by himself. You're a mean tutor!

Cute little Eli alt for you all :3 I know I got a lot of requests for his alt and some wanted an established relationship. I was totally going to do that (and I will, promise), but I had to get into character. Method writer here. Also, I noticed I left my request form out of my new profile design and it's sooooooo much work to fix it, so REQUEST HERE
creator: Farmerhay
